name: CumulusMoodysMarketContext
label: Cumulus Moodys Market Context
description: Synthetic Moodys-style commercial credit risk + market context per Cumulus BUSINESS account, daily snapshot. Federated from FINS.PUBLIC.MOODYS_MARKET_CONTEXT via Snowflake Direct_Access. ACCOUNT_ID FKs to ssot__Account__dlm. v2 re-scope from instrument-scoped (TICKER) to per-BUSINESS-account (ACCOUNT_ID).

fields.name: ssot__AccountId
fields.label: Account ID
fields.description: Salesforce Account ID. FK to ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c.

fields.name: creditRating
fields.label: Credit Rating
fields.description: Moodys 22-grade scale + NR. Year-stable per account.

fields.name: ratingOutlook
fields.label: Rating Outlook
fields.description: Stable / Positive / Negative / Developing / Watch. Year-stable.

fields.name: outlookLastChangedDate
fields.label: Outlook Last Changed Date
fields.description: Last outlook change; NULL when Stable for full year history (~80%).

fields.name: marketCapUsd
fields.label: Market Cap (USD)
fields.description: Market cap derived from ANNUAL_REVENUE * year-stable revenue multiple, with daily noise.

fields.name: liquidityTier
fields.label: Liquidity Tier
fields.description: Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 / Illiquid. Year-stable; biased by market cap.

fields.name: annualRevenueUsd
fields.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
fields.description: Pass-through from V_ACCOUNT_ANCHORS for demo storytelling.
